with Dristy was for the Accelerator package, not the full Leadership package. They discuss the remaining balance and how Dristy's referral discount will be applied. ### [Facilitating additional $5,000 payment @ 7:12](https://fathom.video/share/ZcyqUUCSdiCTt17zeKqDW4AU_MqXHXqX?tab=summary&timestamp=432) Dristy requests a link to pay an additional $5,000 towards the program. Om agrees to provide the link after further clarifying the payment details with the finance team to ensure there are no unnecessary charges. ### [Guidance on SQL and data engineering curriculum @ 20:15](https://fathom.video/share/ZcyqUUCSdiCTt17zeKqDW4AU_MqXHXqX?tab=summary&timestamp=1215) Om provides Dristy with advice on completing the SQL and data engineering fundamentals, emphasizing the importance of the pseudocode development module.
